title: Olive Oil Bottle Glass Oil Dispenser 500ML,Come With a Replacement Grease Nipple, Dispensing Funnel, Small Brush and Two Name Stickers,Clear Borosilicate Oil Bottle for Kitchen, Cooking Oil Container
features: ☀Complete Olive Oil Dispenser Set: Use the spouted olive oil bottle dispenser to protect your olive oil from oxygen, light and heat to cook the tastiest and healthiest meals for your family. Made of high quality glass, it is thick, durable and shatterproof. Package comes with 1 glass bottle, 1 pour spout, 1 pour spout with dust cap, 1 funnel, 2 name stickers

☀ Manageable pour spout: Silicone air-tight sealing cork and anti-spill air duct provide complete control over the amount and flow of oil that comes out every time you pour, with little mess of leaks or spills. Designed so that the oil won't run onto the bottle and stain your table or countertop. Made with 304 Stainless Steel Easy Flip and Easy Seal Caps, it helps protect your expensive oil from all the environmental factors that can affect its flavor and freshness.

☀Transparent and transparent: The glass bottle is suitable for all kinds of liquid seasonings, olive oil, vinegar and soy sauce, etc. The olive oil dispenser has a capacity of 17 oz (500 ml). The clear, high-quality glass allows you to clearly see the amount of liquid remaining and clearly distinguish what's inside, perfect for flavoring oils.

☀Easy to clean and maintain: Say goodbye to a wasteful sprayer or pump and switch to this elegant and functional dispenser. The convenience of this bottle makes your olive oil dispensing enjoyable, creating healthy and hearty meals for your family. The bottle is dishwasher friendly.

☀ Worry-free, Showvigor Guarantee: We love and are proud of our olive oil bottle dispensers and we back them with a lifetime warranty. I believe this product will last a long time. If there is any problem, please contact us and we will solve it. Order now and rest assured that the product will live up to your expectations, guaranteed. If not, we have you covered. Chances are, you'll never need to lend a hand!
